fresh_facts.claim: The US military announced it will begin blockading all Iranian ports and coastal areas, including the Strait of Hormuz, starting Monday April 13, 2026.
US-Iran ceasefire talks in Islamabad collapsed after 21 hours without agreement on April 12, 2026.
Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei was killed in US-Israel strikes on February 28, 2026.
An Interim Leadership Council comprising President Pezeshkian, Chief Justice Mohseni-Eje'i, and Arafi is managing power following Khamenei's death.
The Assembly of Experts is selecting a new Supreme Leader with no current timeline or frontrunner identified.
Iran claims Israeli forces are violating a two-week ceasefire announced by Trump by continuing fire in Lebanon.
The IRGC released footage claiming to have warned a US Navy destroyer in the Strait of Hormuz to change course or face attack.
The IRGC declared 'full control' over the Strait of Hormuz via land, sea, and air with real-time tracking capabilities.
Iranian state reports indicate approximately 3,000 deaths from the February 28 strikes and subsequent crackdown, though human rights groups estimate much higher figures.
fresh_facts.source: Iranian state media / Human rights sources

fresh_facts.claim: Tens of thousands have been detained during crackdowns following the February 28 strikes.
Iran cited US demands for Hormuz control and nuclear dismantlement as sticking points in failed Islamabad talks.
President Pezeshkian discussed regional issues with Putin following the collapse of Islamabad talks.
Trump threatened fresh strikes against Iran and vowed to keep US troops in the Gulf until full Iranian compliance.
The Trump administration issued warnings to China regarding arms sales to Iran.
Hardline Iranian factions branded former Foreign Minister Zarif a 'traitor' for calling for war's end and urged arrests of Zarif and Rouhani.
President Pezeshkian is facing fierce hardliner backlash and is described as being in 'complete political deadlock'.
Pezeshkian appointed IRGC figure Zolghadr to the Supreme National Security Council under pressure from hardliners.
The IRGC is assuming key governmental functions as part of increased military involvement in regime management.
Iran's economy is experiencing a structural collapse marked by currency crisis and high inflation.
The US blockade of Iranian ports is expected to amplify economic pressure on Iran amid existing sanctions.
Australian urea supplies face risks due to Iran war disruptions, causing the Australian Dollar to drop following ceasefire talks collapse.
Iran is deploying unprecedented repression against protests described as the worst crackdown since 1979.
Official Iranian reports indicate approximately 2,000 deaths in protest crackdowns, with higher unofficial estimates from human rights organizations.
ISW assessed recent protests as the most serious internal unrest in Iran's modern history.
Brookings analysis questions whether ongoing protests signal a potential regime tipping point.
Turkish Foreign Minister Fidan discussed US-Pakistan mediated ceasefire and talks with the United States.
Iran accepted a two-week Pakistan-mediated ceasefire despite criticism from internal opponents.
Trump's remarks about backchannel contacts with Iran stirred internal debate within Tehran's establishment.

regime_fall.current_status: A fragile two-week Pakistan-mediated ceasefire is deteriorating as Trump announced a naval blockade of all Iranian ports effective April 14, while Supreme Leader Khamenei's death in February triggered succession crisis with an Interim Leadership Council and Assembly of Experts selecting a new Supreme Leader amid fierce internal power struggles and unprecedented domestic unrest.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei was killed in US-Israel strikes on February 28, 2026, creating a succession vacuum now managed by an Interim Leadership Council comprising President Pezeshkian, Chief Justice Mohseni-Eje'i, and Arafi.
